mapper.update: UPDATE TT_SHPM_T SET HDTY='N' WHERE SHPMID = #{shpmid}
UPDATE TT_SHPM_LEG_T SET HDTY='N' WHERE SHPMID = #{shpmid}
UPDATE TT_LOAD_T A SET TOTPCE = (SELECT SUM(qty) FROM TT_SHPM_LEG_T WHERE LDLEGID=A.LDLEGID) ,UPDATEDATE = #{sysdate} ,UPDATEURKEY = #{surkey} WHERE LDLEGID=#{ldlegid}
mapper.select:
SELECT B.SHPMDETLID ,B.ITEMCD ,B.SHPMID ,A.SHPMNO ,B.QTY FROM TT_SHPM_T A ,TT_SHPM_DETL_T B WHERE A.SHPMID = B.SHPMID AND A.SHPMNO = #{shpmno} AND B.ATTRIBUTE2 = #{attribute2}
AND B.ITEMCD = #{itemcd}
